card_level_diagnosis.summary: The 06/12 card lost both investment positions despite plus-money entries and pregame model edge. The shared issue was overreliance on projected K conversion without sufficient protection against live conversion decay and pitcher-specific failure modes.
card_level_diagnosis.baz_lesson: Baz had runway and whiffs but did not convert them into terminal strikeouts. Future Baz-like profiles need two-strike finish confirmation or reduced pregame stake.
card_level_diagnosis.strider_lesson: Strider repeated the prior burn profile with fastball velocity down, low fastball whiff, early damage, and lost inning runway. He now requires live fastball confirmation before any 7+ exposure.

rule_updates.description: When a pitcher projects well by whiff but has unstable putaway or opponent contact survival risk, avoid standard stake unless live two-strike conversion confirms. Raw whiffs alone are insufficient.
Do not pregame Strider 7+ until fastball velocity/whiff profile returns. If fastball velocity is down at least 1 mph from baseline or CSW is below 31%, downgrade or pass.
